response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned individual contributor with nearly two decades of software development experience and genuine developer-tooling credentials (test frameworks, CI/CD infrastructure, IDE components), but the role is a Level II people-management position and his resume shows no people-management or formal team-leadership experience whatsoever. The required 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of technical leadership are not evidenced, and there is no track record of roadmap ownership, performance management, or organizational change. He would be a credible senior IC candidate on an engineering productivity team, but not for its manager.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Authentic developer-tools background: test runners (Trial, Fluent-Asserts), CI/CD and GitLab infrastructure, IDE components at National Instruments
Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing record through workshops, courses, and code katas
concerns: No people-management experience, which is a hard requirement for this manager role
No demonstrated formal technical leadership of teams, roadmap ownership, or organizational change
Mobile experience is limited to app development rather than mobile platform ecosystem tooling at scale

key_factors.factor: Developer tooling and test infrastructure background
Lack of formal technical leadership track record
